title: schoenus efoliatus
intro: Schoenus efoliatus, also known as the giant woodrush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, Schoenus efoliatus has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Schoenus efoliatus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
